Vertical axis(2)	LD [dOD]
Vertical axis(3)	HT [V]
Vertical axis(4)	Abs

End	200 nm

[Measurement Information]
Instrument name	CD Jasco
Model name	J-1500
Serial No.	A005261638

Detector	PM-539

  Lock-in amp.	X mode
  HT volt	Auto

Measurement date	9/14/2023 11:05 AM

Measure range	700 - 200 nm

FL scale	200 mdeg/1.0 dOD

Bandwidth	1.00 nm
Start mode	Immediately
Scanning speed	200 nm/min
